code_executions.code:
import json

# Define the monthly expenses
expenses = [
    {"category": "rent", "amount": 2500, "description": "Monthly rent"},
    {"category": "utilities", "amount": 150, "description": "Electricity bill"},
    {"category": "utilities", "amount": 100, "description": "Internet/Phone bill"},
    {"category": "office_supplies", "amount": 75, "description": "Office supplies"},
]

# Record all expenses
recorded = []
for exp in expenses:
    resp = json.loads(tools.create_transaction(
        transaction_type="expense",
        category=exp["category"],
        amount=exp["amount"],
        description=exp["description"],
        account="checking"
    ))
    recorded.append(resp)

# Get the checking account balance
balance_resp = json.loads(tools.get_account_balance("checking"))
checking_balance = balance_resp["balance"]

# Get the financial summary
summary_resp = json.loads(tools.get_financial_summary())

# Build the result
total_expenses = sum(exp["amount"] for exp in expenses)

lines = []
lines.append("=" * 50)
lines.append("    MONTHLY EXPENSES RECORDED SUCCESSFULLY")
lines.append("=" * 50)
lines.append("")
lines.append("Expenses Breakdown:")
lines.append("-" * 50)

for i, (exp, rec) in enumerate(zip(expenses, recorded), 1):
    txn = rec["transaction"]
    lines.append(f"  {i}. {txn['description']:<30} ${exp['amount']:>8,.2f}")
    lines.append(f"     Category: {txn['category']}, ID: {txn['id']}")

lines.append("-" * 50)
lines.append(f"  Total Monthly Expenses:          ${total_expenses:>8,.2f}")
lines.append("")
lines.append("=" * 50)
lines.append("    CHECKING ACCOUNT SUMMARY")
lines.append("=" * 50)
lines.append(f"  Remaining Balance:               ${checking_balance:>8,.2f}")
lines.append("")

# Show category breakdown from financial summary
expense_by_cat = summary_resp["summary"]["expense_by_category"]
if expense_by_cat:
    lines.append("Expenses by Category:")
    lines.append("-" * 50)
    for cat, amt in expense_by_cat.items():
        lines.append(f"  {cat:<35} ${amt:>8,.2f}")
    lines.append("-" * 50)

lines.append("")
lines.append("All 4 expense transactions have been recorded to the checking account.")

result = "\n".join(lines)
print(result)

def fmt_money(v):
    sign = "-" if v < 0 else ""
    v = abs(v)
    int_part = int(v)
    dec_part = v - int_part
    s_int = str(int_part)
    groups = []
    while s_int:

total_amount = 0

total_remaining = 0

    status = inv["status"]
    amount = inv["amount"]
    paid = inv.get("paid_amount", 0)
    remaining = amount - paid

    total_amount += amount
    total_paid += paid
    total_remaining += remaining

    status_icon = "✅" if status == "paid" else ("⏳" if status == "partial" else "📨")
    report_lines.append(f"  {status_icon} {client:<13} {status:<12} ${amount:>10,.2f} ${paid:>10,.2f} ${remaining:>10,.2f}")

report_lines.append(f"  Total Outstanding Receivables: ${outstanding:>10,.2f}")

# Income from financial summary
fin_income = summary["summary"]["total_income"]
report_lines.append(f"  Total Income (all sources):  ${fin_income:>12,.2f}")

# Follow-up needed
report_lines.append("\n⚠️  INVOICES NEEDING FOLLOW-UP")
report_lines.append("-" * 70)
if follow_up_invoices:
    for inv in follow_up_invoices:
        remaining = inv["amount"] - inv.get("paid_amount", 0)
        report_lines.append(f"  🔔 {inv['client_name']:<15} Status: {inv['status']:<10} Outstanding: ${remaining:>10,.2f}  Due: {inv['due_date']}")
        if inv["status"] == "partial":
            pct = (inv.get("paid_amount", 0) / inv["amount"]) * 100
            report_lines.append(f"     → {pct:.1f}%% paid, follow up for remaining balance")
        elif inv["status"] == "sent":
            report_lines.append(f"     → No payment received yet, follow up required")
else:
    report_lines.append("  ✅ All invoices are fully paid! No follow-up needed.")

report_lines.append("\n" + "=" * 70)

result = "\n".join(report_lines)
print(result)

# Category breakdown
lines.append("📊 SPENDING BY CATEGORY")
lines.append("-" * 45)
for category, total in category_totals.items():
    pct = (total / total_expenses) * 100
    bar_len = int(pct / 2)
    bar = "█" * bar_len
    lines.append(f"  {category:<28} ${total:>7,.2f}  ({pct:5.1f}%%)")
    lines.append(f"    {bar}")

    # List individual items
    for exp in all_expenses:
        if exp["category"] == category:
            lines.append(f"      • {exp['description']:<22} ${exp['amount']:>7,.2f}")
    lines.append("")

# Top 3 highest expenses
lines.append("🔝 TOP 3 HIGHEST INDIVIDUAL EXPENSES")
lines.append("-" * 45)
for i, exp in enumerate(top_three, 1):
    lines.append(f"  {i}. {exp['description']:<24} ${exp['amount']:>7,.2f}  [{exp['category']}]")

lines.append("")

# Summary totals
lines.append("💰 MONTHLY SUMMARY")
lines.append("-" * 45)
lines.append(f"  Total Expenses:              ${total_expenses:>10,.2f}")
lines.append(f"  Number of Transactions:      {len(all_expenses):>10}")
avg_per_txn = total_expenses / len(all_expenses)
lines.append(f"  Average per Transaction:     ${avg_per_txn:>10,.2f}")
lines.append(f"  Checking Account Balance:    ${checking_balance:>10,.2f}")

lines.append("")

# Category ranking
lines.append("📈 CATEGORY RANKING (Highest to Lowest)")
lines.append("-" * 45)
sorted_categories = sorted(category_totals.items(), key=lambda x: x[1], reverse=True)
for rank, (cat, total) in enumerate(sorted_categories, 1):
    item_count = len([e for e in all_expenses if e["category"] == cat])
    lines.append(f"  {rank}. {cat:<28} ${total:>7,.2f}  ({item_count} items)")

lines.append("")
lines.append("=" * 60)

office_pct = (category_totals["Office Expenses"] / total_expenses) * 100
lines.append(f"  Office expenses account for {office_pct:.1f}%% of total spending,")
lines.append("  making it the largest category. The single biggest expense")
lines.append(f"  is {top_three[0]['description']} at ${top_three[0]['amount']:,.2f}.")
lines.append("=" * 60)

result = "\n".join(lines)
print(result)
